zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford於1028年出生在法國諾門迪艾盧維爾斯時，她的父親Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches49歲，母親Godehildis24歲。她於大約1051年與Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1066年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易利雷享年38歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾艾福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford于1028年出生在法国諾門迪艾盧維爾斯时，她的父亲Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches49岁，母亲Godehildis24岁。她于大约1051年与Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1066年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易利雷享年38岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾艾福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tosny
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jean Pierre.
Americanized form of any of various surnames ultimately derived from the Latin personal name Antonius (see Anthony ), for example Greek Antoniou and Italian Toni .
French: from the personal name Tony, a pet form of Antonin (from Latin Antoninus, a derivative of Antonius; see Anthony ).

variants.name: Anthony
meanings: English and West Indian (mainly Antigua and Barbuda, Saint Lucia, and Trinidad and Tobago, also Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Anthony, Latin Antonius, which, with its variants and cognates, is one of the commonest personal names in Europe. Spellings with -h-, which first appear in English in the 16th century and in French (as Anthoine) at about the same time, are due to the erroneous belief that the name derives from Greek anthos ‘flower’. The popularity of the personal name in Christendom is largely due to the cult of the Egyptian hermit Saint Anthony ( AD 251–356), who in his old age gathered a community of hermits around him, and for that reason is regarded by some as the founder of monasticism. It was further increased by the fame of Saint Anthony of Padua (1195–1231), who long enjoyed a great popular cult and who is believed to help people find lost things. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and derivatives (patronymics) from other languages, for example Greek patronymic Antoniades , Italian Antoni , Polish Antoniewicz , Croatian and Serbian Antonović (see Antonovich ) and Antunović; see also below. The name Anthony is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Antony .

German, Flemish, and French (mainly Alsace): Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from local equivalents of the Latin personal name Antonius, from its genitive form Antoni(i). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the German, Dutch, French, and Slovak cognates Antoni 1 and Antony 2.
History: John Anthony of Hampstead, Middlesex, England (now part of north London) migrated to Boston, MA, in 1634. By 1640 he had moved to Providence, RI, where his descendants are still established.

nameMeanings.name: Adelise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford was born in 1028, in Louviers, Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches, was 49 and her mother, Godehildis, was 24. She married Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford about 1051, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1066, in Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Évreux, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford est née en 1028, à Louviers, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Godehildis, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford environ 1051, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1066, à Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Évreux, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford 1028 in Louviers, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches 49 und ihre Mutter Godehildis 24. Sie hat um 1051 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1066 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford circa 1051, nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1066, nel Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelise de Tosny Countess of Herefordが1028年にフランスノーマンディエウアロウヴィエルズで生まれた時，父Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conchesは49歳，母Godehildisは24歳であった。約1051年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンでSir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1066年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーリルeで38歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアevレウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 리e
ko.lifeSummary: Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford(이)가 1028년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 루비어스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Godehildis(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1051년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1066년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 리e에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 e브레우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford nasceu em 1028, em Louviers, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Godehildis, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford aproximadamente 1051, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1066, em Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Évreux, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: лирe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford родилась в 1028 г. в местности лоувиирс, эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Godehildis, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford около 1051 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1066 г. в местности лирe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности eвреукс, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford nació en 1028, en Louviers, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Roger I d'Espagne de Tosny de Conches, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Godehildis, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford aproximadamente 1051, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1066, en Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
